claim.content: For the paramagnetic two-dimensional homogeneous electron gas at density parameter r_s=10, extrapolating finite-N DMC effective masses obtained from quartic-band fits gives the thermodynamic-limit quasiparticle effective mass m^*(∞)=1.03(4) a.u., where m^* is defined by m^*=k_F/(dE/dk)_{k_F}.
